transfer.server.workflowdetails.CfnAbout: Container for the `WorkflowDetail` data type. It is used by actions that trigger a workflow to begin execution.

transfer.server.workflowdetails.OnUpload.Description: A trigger that starts a workflow: the workflow begins to execute after a file is uploaded.  To remove an associated workflow from a server, you can provide an empty `OnUpload` object, as in the following example.   `aws transfer update-server --server-id s-01234567890abcdef --workflow-details '{"OnUpload":[]}'`
